The Doctor Who Drabble Files
By: badly-knitted
My third drabble collection, this will be mainly drabbles written for the dw100 community, although there may be others inspired by other challenges. Characters and ratings will vary, both canon and non-canon can be expected, and suggestions are welcome.
Rated: Fiction T - English - Chapters: 1117 - Words: 170,933 - Reviews: 1,265 - Favs: 37 - Follows: 33 - Updated: 2h - Published: 2/8/2015 - id: 11029690

Title: Utterly Alien

Author: badly-knitted

.

OoOoOoOoOoOoOoOoOoOoOoOoOoOoOoOoOoOoOoOoOoOoO

.

Travelling with the Doctor, Clara's seen loads of aliens, large, small, friendly, hostile, fluffy, scaly, and everything in between.

The End
